---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Debugra
title: "[FEAT] <Short description of the proposed feature>"
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: ""
---

### ✦ Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g., "I'm frustrated when...")

### ⟡ Describe the Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Describe any UI design elements, components, or helper hooks that would need changes.

### ✦ Describe Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

### 🎨 Visual Mockup/Sketches (Optional)
If you have any sketches, UI ideas, or screenshots of similar features, paste them here.

### ⟡ Additional Context
Add any other context or references about the feature request here.
